name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

interface.longDescription: Use agent-skills in Codex as a native plugin with a dedicated Codex skill bundle: the original long-form skills plus explicit command-alias workflows like spec, plan, build, test, review, ship, and code-simplify.
defaultPrompt: Use @agent-skills:spec to start a spec before coding.
Use @agent-skills:build and @agent-skills:test for the next task.
Use @agent-skills:review before I merge this change.
